ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the chart */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the track */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the track on the streaming platform */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the track belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label producing the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit lyrics */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the popularity of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record label */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the record label */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the record label's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the record label was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private, collaborative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record in the association table */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated track */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being streamed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user streaming the track */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date of the streaming event */,
  "stream_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stream in seconds */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for streaming (e.g., mobile, desktop, smart speaker) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the stream */,
  "is_skip" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user skipped the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has this role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., artist, admin, listener) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track for which analytics are recorded */,
  "total_streams" INTEGER /* Total number of streams for the track */,
  "unique_listeners" INTEGER /* Number of unique listeners for the track */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last analytics update */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of streams for the track */,
  "streaming_regions" TEXT /* JSON string containing regions where the track is most streamed */,
  "user_demographics" TEXT /* JSON string containing demographic data of listeners */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)
